closed_entries.summary: Fable ruled this was not a true design ambiguity: XBRL values do not call the text canonicalizer. The materializer applies P4c's fixed conversion table at emit time.

Fable binding (d): stored Period dates are exclusive-end; all reads decode to effective dates first (duration end_date - 1d; instant stored - 1d; starts unshifted per period_start_check.json). Raw==pOR rows skip+count as period_end_convention_suspect; instant_off_pOR_by_one retired.

closed_entries.area: P4g raw-duplicate key and precision fixture
closed_entries.summary: Fable accepted synthetic-only precision-duplicate proof and proposed the O12 pin: raw-duplicate key includes decimals, so same-context same-value different-decimals pairs fall through to the precision rule.

entries_resolved.resolution: fixed P4c/P4a conversion table at emit time; text canonicalizer not called on XBRL facts

effective-date decode everywhere (P4b primacy, P14 classifier, gp ids, build_known, P4h on effective dates; raw in provenance); suspect-skip for raw==pOR rows; counters replaced (period_end_convention_suspect + report_primary_window_missing)

entries_resolved.goes_to: O12 bundle (ingestion repair / future certified recovery)
entries_resolved.resolution: skip+count slice_pairing_dualcik_unresolved; NO aliasing / qname-only / cross-CIK; AAL kept

entries_resolved.area: P4g raw-duplicate key and precision fixture
entries_resolved.goes_to: O12 bundle (raw-duplicate key pin + rollout counter)
entries_resolved.resolution: accept synthetic-only precision fixture; raw-duplicate key includes decimals; add p4g_precision_kept rollout counter

gate_note: gate counts len(entries_open); resolved pins go to the XBRL ratification bundle
note: Open entries only. Gate requires len(entries)==0 to PASS.
